objective: Implement the diagnostics skeleton: categorized redacted logging and the bounded local diagnostics export.
deliverables: Unified Logging categories with privacy redaction for device IDs, paths and business strings.
Bounded, rotating structured diagnostics correlated to Job/Session.
User-triggered local export that excludes device raw artifacts by default.

verification.expectedEvidence: Every GIVEN/WHEN/THEN/AND clause of openspec/specs/desktop-ux-observability/spec.md#AC-DIAG-001-01 is observed and recorded without restatement or weakening.
Every GIVEN/WHEN/THEN/AND clause of openspec/specs/desktop-ux-observability/spec.md#AC-DIAG-001-02 is observed and recorded without restatement or weakening.
Every GIVEN/WHEN/THEN/AND clause of openspec/specs/desktop-ux-observability/spec.md#AC-DIAG-002-01 is observed and recorded without restatement or weakening.

verification.method: Unified Logging categories and bounded diagnostics export skeleton.
verification.expectedEvidence: Logs are categorized and redacted, structured diagnostics stay within their rotation bounds, and the export bundle contains no device raw artifacts by default.

stopConditions: Any log or export path can leak an unredacted sensitive field.
Diagnostics storage can grow without bound.
